name_cn:
Premium Grade Replica Fendi
FENDI Hot Classic Baguette, crafted from high-end canvas, double FF 3D embroidery texture is superb, paired with exquisite trim and color blocking for a stylish look. Wide shoulder strap and flip-top design offer great practicality. Love the small details everywhere~~size27×6×14cm
Style 8600 Grey
